'''dhalopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidophore|cnidophore]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidophore|cnidophore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhalopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhælepeth|dhælepeth]] || [[word:dhælepej|dhælepej]] || [[word:dhælepesh|dhælepesh]] || [[word:dhælepe|dhælepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhalolopoth|dhalolopoth]] || [[word:dhalolopoj|dhalolopoj]] || [[word:dhaloloposh|dhaloloposh]] || [[word:dhalolopo|dhalolopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhalopoth|dhalopoth]] || [[word:dhalopoj|dhalopoj]] || [[word:dhaloposh|dhaloposh]] || [[word:dhalopo|dhalopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhalofpoth|dhalofpoth]] || [[word:dhalofpoj|dhalofpoj]] || [[word:dhalofposh|dhalofposh]] || [[word:dhalofpof|dhalofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhalopotho|dhalopotho]] || [[word:dhalopojo|dhalopojo]] || [[word:dhaloposho|dhaloposho]] || [[word:dhalopoko|dhalopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhalopoth|dhalopoth]] || [[word:dhalopoj|dhalopoj]] || [[word:dhaloposh|dhaloposh]] || [[word:dhalopo|dhalopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhalopothol|dhalopothol]] || [[word:dhalopojol|dhalopojol]] || [[word:dhaloposhol|dhaloposhol]] || [[word:dhalopokol|dhalopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhalopothotho|dhalopothotho]] || [[word:dhalopojojo|dhalopojojo]] || [[word:dhaloposhosho|dhaloposhosho]] || [[word:dhalopoko|dhalopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhalopothon|dhalopothon]] || [[word:dhalopojon|dhalopojon]] || [[word:dhaloposhon|dhaloposhon]] || [[word:dhalopokon|dhalopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhalopothoro|dhalopothoro]] || [[word:dhalopojoro|dhalopojoro]] || [[word:dhaloposhoro|dhaloposhoro]] || [[word:dhalopokoro|dhalopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
